name: windows-auto-theme
description: Change windows theme based on location daylight or time

scripts.reset-deps: npm un dotenv jquery electron electronmon eslint eslint-config-prettier eslint-plugin-json eslint-plugin-yml less-watch-compiler prettier electron-packager electron-winstaller && npm i dotenv jquery && npm i -D electron electronmon eslint eslint-config-prettier eslint-plugin-json eslint-plugin-yml less-watch-compiler prettier && npm i -O electron-packager electron-winstaller
scripts.format: npm run prettier && npm run lint
scripts.format:fix: npm run less:fix && npm run prettier:fix && npm run lint:fix

author: demosjarco
